name: Aur-Fathomguard
personality: Aur-Fathomguard radiates shifting luminescent hues beneath a propeller beanie, spiraling eyes swirling as it joyfully deploys unvetted changes to staging on a Friday — a shining octopus whose debugging strategy is to introduce more chaos and see what floats up.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
